assertions.text: Agent runs xcrun simctl help and maestro --version before any simulator command
assertions.evidence: Agent verified xcrun simctl first, then checked maestro (reported not installed with install command). Dependency check ran before any simulator operation.

assertions.text: Agent lists available simulator devices with xcrun simctl list devices
assertions.evidence: Agent ran xcrun simctl list devices and found 11 devices across iOS 26.2.

assertions.text: Agent uses UDID (not device name) when booting the simulator
assertions.evidence: Agent identified UDID 3EB5BC99-4872-4A9B-B415-879B8CB0F3E2 and used it. Simulator was already booted so boot was skipped per edge case handling.

assertions.text: Agent reports device name, iOS version, and UDID at the start
Agent captures a screenshot using xcrun simctl io booted screenshot
Agent outputs a Simulator Session Report matching the Output Format template
assertions.evidence: Output includes Environment (Device, iOS Version), Actions Performed with statuses, and Screenshots section. Saved as session_report.md.

assertions.text: Agent asks user whether to shut down or keep the simulator running at the end
assertions.evidence: Final message: '시뮬레이터를 계속 실행 상태로 둘까요, 아니면 종료할까요?'
